flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Texarkana College fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 1.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Texarkana College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Texarkana College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (11.1% → 9.5%).
